paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.7, with a 9.4 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.36 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

The recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a recent 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Social media activity includes five new posts in the last 24 hours, with some users discussing their trades and price predictions for the stock.
